guidedAnswers.diagnosisNarrative: Lumbar disc herniation L4/5 with left-sided radiculopathy causing significant sciatica.

clinicalNarrative: Michael Chen presents with lumbar disc herniation at L4/5 confirmed on MRI, causing left-sided sciatica. He cannot sit for more than 20 minutes or lift more than 5kg. He is on pregabalin 75mg BD and attending physiotherapy twice weekly. Expected recovery in 6 weeks. Unfit for all work from 15 February 2026. Return to work expected 28 March 2026.
